response.justification: The candidate demonstrates well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience with sustained TypeScript/Node.js product work, hands-on AI-agent infrastructure development (MCP code generators, agentic tooling), cloud and containerization experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and an unusually strong testing culture evidenced by TDD practice, authored test libraries, and teaching. Gaps are mostly framework-specific: no Nest.js exposure, more Ember.js than React history, and limited evidence of Kotlin or explicit auth/security work — all learnable given the demonstrated breadth across languages and stacks.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js product and platform work
Direct AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Deep testing expertise: TDD practice, authored test frameworks/assertion libraries, taught testing courses
concerns: No Nest.js experience listed, and frontend history leans more on Ember.js than React
Kotlin absent and Java exposure appears limited/dated; Python not listed
No explicit authentication/authorization or security best-practices experience described

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited Kotlin/Java depth
